title: Termite Treatment in Somers, NY | $800-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Somers, Westchester. Licensed exterminators serving Somers homes and businesses. Free inspections. Call for same-day service starting at $800.
intro: Somers, NY homeowners face serious threats from subterranean termites that can damage wooden structures, especially in the area's many historic homes and properties near Lake Lincolndale. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Somers and Westchester County, protecting your investment with proven elimination methods and preventative solutions. Our licensed technicians offer thorough inspections and customized treatment plans ranging from $800 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity and property size.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of termite control expertise to Somers residents, using eco-friendly treatment options and the latest detection technology. We're fully licensed in Westchester County, offer free termite inspections, and back our work with comprehensive warranties to ensure your home remains termite-free for years to come.
localContext: Somers' mix of older colonial homes, lakefront properties around Lake Lincolndale and Shenorock, and wooded neighborhoods creates ideal conditions for termite activity, particularly in areas with moisture issues or wood-to-soil contact. Properties near Lasdon Park, Reis Park, and the historic Elephant Hotel require regular termite monitoring due to the town's humid climate and abundant vegetation that attracts these destructive pests.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Somers typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller homes with localized infestations may cost around $800-$1,500, while larger properties or severe infestations requiring whole-home treatments can reach $3,000-$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Somers homes?
faqs.answer: Common termite warning signs include mud tubes on foundation walls, hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, small pinholes in drywall, and visible wood damage. In Somers' older homes, you may also notice sagging floors, buckling wood, or frass (termite droppings) that resemble sawdust. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for a free inspection.

faqs.question: What termite treatment methods do you use in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer several proven termite treatment methods including liquid termiticide barriers, termite baiting systems, and localized wood treatments. For Somers properties, we often recommend liquid treatments around the foundation perimeter or bait stations for ongoing monitoring, depending on your home's construction and the infestation severity. All our treatments are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide termite treatment in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day termite inspections for Somers residents, with most treatments scheduled within 2-3 days of inspection completion. Emergency services are available for severe infestations. Treatment time varies from 4-8 hours for most homes depending on size and method used. We'll work around your schedule to minimize disruption to your daily routine.
